THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, JUANITA BROWN, DAVID C. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 149 SIXTH STEET #25, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL APR-16-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & FEES. EVICTION STAYED THRU 9AM ON 4-16-97. MUTUAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS. IF DEFTS COMPLY WITH STIP, PLTF WILL MOVE TO VACATE JUDGMNT & DISM. IF EITHER SIDE FAILS TO COMPLY W/TERMS, EITHER SIDE MAY APPLY EX-PARTE UPON DECLARATION & NOTICE FOR RELIEF.
